name: HFT CSI 100 Index Fund (LOF)
summary: HFT CSI 100 Index Fund (LOF) is an index fund that tracks the performance of the CSI 100 Index and is listed as an Open-Ended Fund (LOF). The fund aims to provide investors with exposure to the top 100 companies listed on the Shanghai and Shenzhen stock exchanges. It is managed by HFT Investment Management Co., Ltd., a Chinese asset management firm.
